notes: Runtime support is read-only and based on a private third-party SRNE-compatible Modbus map.

known_limitations: Read-only first implementation; no write controls are exposed.
Requires collector serial settings compatible with Modbus RTU 9600 8N1 and inverter slave address 1.
Telemetry map is based on a third-party SRNE-compatible Modbus register map and still needs owner confirmation through a fresh support archive after integration update.
Detection relies on the product-info register block containing an SRNE-like marker; commercial model names may need follow-up catalog entries.
knowledge_summary: SRNE-compatible Modbus support is based on a private third-party register map. The runtime adds a read-only surface using slave address 1, product-info detection at registers 53-72, and telemetry ranges for controller, fault, inverter, and optional phase data.
